village.prompt: A quiet European village square on a sunny summer day. A tall maypole decorated with a green wreath stands in the center of the cobblestone square, surrounded by red brick houses with tiled roofs and small green trees. Bright blue sky with scattered white clouds.
commands: go to the maypole in the center of the square
walk up to one of the red brick houses

lighthouse.prompt: A small historic lighthouse with a cream-colored tower and red base on a grassy rocky point beside a calm river mouth, on a sunny day. Golden dune grass and dark rocks in the foreground, a distant shoreline with small houses across the blue water, scattered white clouds in a blue sky.
commands: go to the rocks by the water

barn.prompt: A rural farmyard under a dramatic partly cloudy sky. A black wooden barn with a bright red roof and yellow lettering stands on a green lawn, and a dirt track runs past it toward a gray two-story farmhouse among tall pine trees. Autumn trees line the left side, with thick grass beside the track.
commands: walk up to the black barn with the red roof
go to the gray two-story farmhouse
